inputs.titre: Martyrdom of Saints Serge and Bacchus

reason: The image depicts two men in what appears to be Roman attire, standing in an urban setting. One wears what resembles lorica segmentata, while the other is draped in a toga-like garment. There are other figures in the background, along with architectural elements suggestive of an ancient city. The lighting and general atmosphere convey a sense of historical drama. Although the armor looks a little off, it could be artist liberties. The robes could use some work. Overall, the image is good.
